title: Maintenance Parts List for CV2
description:
Maintenance Parts List for CV2

Compact Vision CV2

Part
		 Name	Code

CPU
		 Board	For CV2-S/L/SA	2175329

For CV2-H/HA	2175328

For CV2-LB	2230207

For CV2-SB	2230208

For CV2-HB	2230210

PoE
		 Board *	2168503

PoE
		 Board-A *	2204519

PoE
		 board-B *	2230214

LED/SW
		 Board	2168504

Memory	For CV2-S/H/L (2GB)	2208280

For CV2-SA/HA (4GB)	2182048

For CV2-LB/SB/HB	2230215

CFast	For CV2-S/H (2GB)	2168501

For CV2-L (2G)	2194001

For CV2-SA/HA (8GB)	2182047

For CV2-LB/SB/HB	2230212

Battery	2168507

Chassis
		 Fan	2168505

Fan
		 Filter	1653513

Power
		 Supply Connector	2168506

Mounting
		 Bracket	1653498

* When the PoE board is replaced, choose the one referring to the following table.

Firmware
		 version	The
		 replaced board

CV2-S/H/L	2.3.3.2 or before

or the version
		 is unclear	PoE board

(Code 2168503)

2.3.3.3 or later	PoE board-A

(Code 2204519)

CV2-SA/HA

CV2-LB/SB/HB	** PoE board-B

** Maintenance parts for CV2-LB/SB/HB contact the supplier of your region.
